word: G2104 - εὐγενής - eugenḗs - yoog-en'-ace - More noble

sections.paragraph:
- Original: εὐγένης

- Transliteration: Eugenes

- Phonetic: yoog-en'-ace

- Definition:

1. well born, of a noble family

2. noble minded

- Origin: from G2095 and G1096

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adjective

- Strong's: From G2095 and G1096; well born that is (literally) high in rank or (figuratively) generous: - more noble nobleman.
